Package com.dhk.model.button

Class ButtonProperties

java.lang.Object
com.dhk.model.button.ButtonProperties
public class ButtonProperties extends Object
Properties for a custom button.

  • Constructor Details

    • ButtonProperties

      public ButtonProperties()
      Default constructor for the ButtonProperties class.

    • ButtonProperties

      public ButtonProperties(String tooltip, Dimension size, float idleScale, float heldScale)
      Constructor for the ButtonProperties class.
      Parameters:
      tooltip - - The tooltip for the button (not required)
      size - - The size of the button
      idleScale - - The idle scale of the button
      heldScale - - The held scale of the button
